questionHtml:
Which is a homogeneous mixture?

A.     Oil and water

B.     Sand and water

C.     Ethanol and water

D.     Chalk and sand

meta.title: Which is a homogeneous mixture? A. Oil and water B. Sand and water C. Ethanol and water D. Chalk and sand
